Program Listing for File heightmap_loader.cpp

↰ Return to documentation for file (src/io/heightmap_loader.cpp)

#include "heightmap_loader.hpp"
#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <string>
#include <vector>

#ifdef CARDILLO_USE_TINYEXR
#ifndef TINYEXR_IMPLEMENTATION
#define TINYEXR_IMPLEMENTATION
#endif
// Prefer system zlib over bundled miniz to avoid extra vendoring
#ifndef TINYEXR_USE_MINIZ
#define TINYEXR_USE_MINIZ 0
#endif
#include <tinyexr.h>
#include <zlib.h>
#endif

namespace cardillo::io {

bool load_exr_heightmap(const std::string& path, Eigen::Matrix<coal::CoalScalar, Eigen::Dynamic, Eigen::Dynamic>& heights_out, int& rows, int& cols) {
    rows = 0;
    cols = 0;
    heights_out.resize(0, 0);
#ifdef CARDILLO_USE_TINYEXR
    // First, try the simple RGBA loader (handles many EXR variants)
    {
        float* rgba = nullptr;
        int w = 0, h = 0;
        const char* err = nullptr;
        int r = LoadEXR(&rgba, &w, &h, path.c_str(), &err);
        if (r == TINYEXR_SUCCESS && rgba && w > 0 && h > 0) {
            cols = w;
            rows = h;
            heights_out.resize(rows, cols);
            for (int y = 0; y < rows; ++y) {
                for (int x = 0; x < cols; ++x) {
                    // Take R as height
                    heights_out(y, x) = static_cast<coal::CoalScalar>(rgba[4 * (y * cols + x) + 0]);
                }
            }
            free(rgba);
            return true;
        } else if (err) {
            std::printf("[Heightmap] RGBA EXR load failed: %s\n", err);
            FreeEXRErrorMessage(err);
        }
        if (rgba) free(rgba);
    }

    // Fallback: detailed image loader with channel selection
    EXRHeader header;
    EXRImage image;
    const char* err = nullptr;
    InitEXRHeader(&header);
    InitEXRImage(&image);
    EXRVersion ver;
    int ret = 0;
#ifdef ParseEXRVersionFromFile
    ret = ParseEXRVersionFromFile(&ver, path.c_str());
    if (ret != 0) {
        std::printf("[Heightmap] Failed to parse EXR version for '%s'\n", path.c_str());
        return false;
    }
#endif
    ret = ParseEXRHeaderFromFile(&header, &ver, path.c_str(), &err);
    if (ret != 0) {
        if (err) {
            std::printf("[Heightmap] EXR header parse failed: %s\n", err);
            FreeEXRErrorMessage(err);
        }
        FreeEXRHeader(&header);
        return false;
    }
    if (header.num_channels > 0) {
        header.requested_pixel_types = (int*)malloc(sizeof(int) * header.num_channels);
        for (int i = 0; i < header.num_channels; i++) header.requested_pixel_types[i] = TINYEXR_PIXELTYPE_FLOAT;
    }
    ret = LoadEXRImageFromFile(&image, &header, path.c_str(), &err);
    if (ret != 0) {
        if (err) {
            std::printf("[Heightmap] EXR image load failed: %s\n", err);
            FreeEXRErrorMessage(err);
        }
        FreeEXRHeader(&header);
        FreeEXRImage(&image);
        return false;
    }

    cols = image.width;
    rows = image.height;
    if (cols <= 0 || rows <= 0 || image.num_channels <= 0) {
        std::printf("[Heightmap] Invalid EXR image dims or channels.\n");
        FreeEXRHeader(&header);
        FreeEXRImage(&image);
        return false;
    }

    int chan_idx = 0;
    if (image.num_channels == 1)
        chan_idx = 0;
    else if (header.channels && header.num_channels > 0) {
        auto pick = [&](const char* name) -> int {
            for (int i = 0; i < header.num_channels; ++i) {
                if (!header.channels[i].name[0]) continue;
                std::string n(header.channels[i].name);
                for (auto& c : n) c = (char)std::tolower((unsigned char)c);
                if (n == name) return i;
            }
            return -1;
        };
        int idx = -1;
        if (idx < 0) idx = pick("r");
        if (idx < 0) idx = pick("y");
        if (idx < 0) idx = pick("height");
        if (idx < 0) idx = pick("z");
        if (idx >= 0) chan_idx = idx;
    }
    float* chan = nullptr;
    if (image.images && image.images[chan_idx]) chan = reinterpret_cast<float*>(image.images[chan_idx]);
    if (!chan) {
        std::printf("[Heightmap] EXR has no readable channel data.\n");
        FreeEXRHeader(&header);
        FreeEXRImage(&image);
        return false;
    }

    heights_out.resize(rows, cols);
    for (int y = 0; y < rows; ++y) {
        for (int x = 0; x < cols; ++x) {
            heights_out(y, x) = static_cast<coal::CoalScalar>(chan[y * cols + x]);
        }
    }

    FreeEXRHeader(&header);
    FreeEXRImage(&image);
    return true;
#else
    std::printf("[Heightmap] EXR loader disabled (CARDILLO_USE_TINYEXR not defined). Requested: %s\n", path.c_str());
    return false;
#endif
}

}  // namespace cardillo::io
